mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions, which triggers risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong consumer demand, which drives corporate earnings optimism and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative when both GDPC1 and HOUST show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 105.0 indicates weakening manufacturing activity, which signals recession risks and negative S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle regimes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns despite INDPRO falling below 105.0 in late-cycle periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 2.5% triggers inflationary expectations, prompting central bank hawkishness and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls above 150k signals robust labor market health, which supports consumer spending and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative when PAYEMS exceeds 150k for three consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in real sales of new homes above 1200k indicates strong demand for housing, which drives construction activity and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite HOUST exceeding 1200k for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in the federal funds rate and rise in CPI above 2.5% signals conflicting monetary policy signals, creating uncertainty that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS declines and CPI rises above thresholds.
